title: Roundup Weedkiller Total Optima, spray, 3 litre
features: Kills weeds fast with visible results in just 3 hours – glyphosate-free, ready to use
Active ingredient naturally breaks down in soil
Ready for replanting 3 days after application
Use all around the garden on flower beds, borders and veg patches
Can be used to kill clover, chickweed, common groundsel, black medick and annual meadow-grass

Visible results in just 3 hours You’ll notice results in just 3 hours with this fast-acting weedkiller product. Rain-fast after 3 hours After 3 hours, product will not be washed away by rain. Reduces the need for repeat treatment. Replanting possible 3 days after application 100% naturally occurring ingredients allow for replanting and reseeding just 3 days after treatment. Next page 1 Breaks Down In Soil 2 Results In 3 Hours 3 Rain-Fast 4 Replant In 3 Days A weedkiller that naturally breaks down in soil Plant and re-seed within 3 days thanks to high-performance ingredients, that naturally break down in soil. Multi-purpose, ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima tackles a wide range of annual broad-leaved weeds such as clover, chickweed, black medick and annual meadow grass. Starts working within 3 hours. Ideal for vegetable patches, borders, flower beds, paths and patios as an effective weed solution. * THIS CLAIM IS PROVIDED TO HELP DISTINGUISH FROM OTHER FORMULAS THAT MAY CONTAIN GLYPHOSATE. Why should I use ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima? This high-performing glyphosate-free is the result of in-depth research and development. Based on naturally-occurring active ingredients, it leaves no residues in the soil and can be used to control a wide range of annual broad-leaved weeds. Where can I use ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima? ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima can be used on weeds in flowerbeds, borders, pots, containers and vegetable patches as well as paths and patios. It's most effective on young weeds smaller than 10 cm. When should I use ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima? Can be used between April and November. For best results apply in warm, dry conditions when weeds are young and actively growing, usually during spring or early summer. After 3 hours, product will not be washed away by rain. How do I use ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima? Apply spray evenly to wet the leaves of the weeds, avoiding run-off. Repeat treatment if necessary after a minimum of 7 days for larger weeds or where re-growth occurs. Is ROUNDUP Weedkiller Total Optima safe to use on areas used by children and pets? All our products exceed stringent Government regulations and are suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Ensure you restrict access to the treated area during mixing, application and drying time of the product. Compare our range of weed control products Total Optima Add To Basket Total Optima Conc.
